Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14823 0 0}What brings you to the nurse's office? Eeeheehee...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}I can't just give you potent medication whenever you want. Haven't you heard of the Pharmaceutical Affairs Law?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14822 0 0}Hm? It's an emergency? And you absolutely, without a doubt need my medicine?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oookay, but if you're lying to me, I'll curse your kneecaps so they'll crack every waking moment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14815 0 0}This is a special medicine I brewed myself, but I don't know if I would call it potent.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14803 0 0}You got what you wanted, so off you go now.[n]{f 1 1}
